slides.title: Keyword capacity
slides.business_implication: Demand scale defines whether the category deserves full product development effort.

slides.title: Keyword trend
slides.business_implication: Seasonality shapes launch timing, ad budget, and inventory.

slides.title: Keyword family detail
slides.business_implication: Families separate product jobs that should not share one message.

slides.title: Keyword opportunity matrix
slides.data_basis: demand, conversion, competition, and PPC role
slides.business_implication: Keyword actions must split launch SEO, PPC, and content.

slides.title: TOP ASIN competitor matrix
slides.business_implication: Top listings reveal trust barriers and minimum proof requirements.

slides.title: Competitor group detail
slides.business_implication: Competitor groups show whether the target brand should enter as value, premium, or specialist.

slides.title: Brand share
slides.data_basis: monthly sales amount by normalized brand
slides.business_implication: Share concentration determines how sharp differentiation must be.

slides.title: Traffic mix
slides.business_implication: Traffic mix estimates launch CAC pressure.

slides.title: Product scheme matrix
slides.business_implication: Scheme repetition reveals where true differentiation is needed.

slides.title: Product teardown
slides.data_basis: feature, package, use case, and proof asset extraction
slides.business_implication: Teardown converts competitor observations into R&D requirements.

slides.title: Review risk cluster
slides.business_implication: Review risks define the minimum viable quality bar.

slides.title: Listing proof audit
slides.data_basis: main image, A+, video, badges, proof assets
slides.business_implication: Conversion proof must be visible before scaling ads.

slides.title: Price-product positioning map
slides.business_implication: Positioning should be based on proof and willingness to pay.

slides.title: Compliance risk
slides.data_basis: claims, warnings, use limitations, platform policy risk
slides.business_implication: Compliance risks should be resolved before final packaging and claims.

slides.title: SKU ladder
slides.data_basis: price bands, product schemes, and user jobs
slides.business_implication: The SKU ladder separates acquisition, margin, and repeat-purchase roles.

slides.title: Annual target
slides.data_basis: ASP, units, quarterly ramp, and review milestones
slides.business_implication: Targets must be grounded in unit ramp and review acquisition.

slides.title: Inventory launch plan
slides.data_basis: quarterly unit ramp and lead time
slides.business_implication: Inventory planning prevents launch success from turning into stockout risk.

slides.title: Execution roadmap
slides.data_basis: product, content, ads, operations, and risks by quarter
slides.business_implication: The roadmap turns the report into an execution plan.
